name: phase3-tune-vision
description: Guide for tuning vision sensitivity without code changes

action.message:
Tune Phase 3 vision sensitivity. All changes are .env only — no code changes needed.

CURRENT DEFAULTS:
  VISION_MODEL=us.amazon.nova-pro-v1:0
  MAX_REPLANS=3
  VISION_TIMEOUT=4.0
  VISION_MIN_STEP=0.5

TO MAKE VISION MORE CONSERVATIVE (fewer interventions):
  VISION_MIN_STEP=1.0    # skip steps shorter than 1 s
  MAX_REPLANS=1          # allow at most 1 replan per run
  VISION_TIMEOUT=2.0     # shorter timeout → more timeouts → more 'continue'

TO MAKE VISION MORE AGGRESSIVE (more interventions):
  VISION_MIN_STEP=0.3    # assess even short steps
  MAX_REPLANS=5          # allow up to 5 replans per run
  VISION_TIMEOUT=8.0     # longer timeout → more time for Nova Pro to respond

TO DISABLE VISION ENTIRELY:
  Use python main.py (without --vision flag)
  Or python main.py --mock

NOTE: Changing VISION_MODEL or AWS_REGION requires restarting the server.
Changing MAX_REPLANS, VISION_TIMEOUT, VISION_MIN_STEP takes effect on next execution
(values read from agent.py constants at import time — restart required for .env changes).

Show the current .env values and suggest appropriate tuning for the described use case.
